whyItMatters: PharmGKB curates pharmacogenomic evidence from the literature, with level 1A–2B annotations backed by expert review and published clinical studies.
notes: PharmGKB annotations reflect published literature and should not replace clinical pharmacogenomic testing.

title: CACNA1S / sevoflurane
summary: Patients with the rs772226819 GG genotype may have a decreased, but not absent, risk for malignant hyperthermia when treated with sevoflurane as compared to patients with the AA or AG genotype. Other genetic or clinical factors may also influence the risk for malignant hyperthermia.
riskSummary: CACNA1S variant associated with toxicity for sevoflurane
